programme.title: Day 1 - Qatar Equestrian Federation Cup
programme.desc: Qatar Equestrian Federation Cup 2026 concludes the Doha Equestrian Tour at Al Shaqab, bringing together more than 200 riders in CSI1* to CSI5* show jumping classes and a total prize purse of €784,000. The competition features ranking classes, Grand Prix action and decisive Jump-Off rounds, where faults and time determine the winners.

programme.title: Day 1 - Al Shaqab Cup 2026
programme.desc: The Al Shaqab Cup is a prestigious equestrian event held in Doha from 25 to 29 March 2026, bringing together elite international riders and top-level horses in high-caliber competition. Staged at the world-class Al Shaqab venue, the event showcases the sport’s excellence and international appeal through a program of top-class equestrian action.

programme.title: Getafe vs Athletic Club - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
programme.desc: Getafe have won just one of their last 11 LaLiga games against Athletic Club, a 1-0 victory in October 2025. They have only achieved a league double over Athletic Club in the top-flight on two previous occasions: 2004/05 and 2012/13. Athletic Club are unbeaten in their last six away games against Getafe CF in LaLiga, their best away unbeaten run against the 'Azulones' in the competition's history.

programme.title: Alavés vs Osasuna - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
programme.desc: Deportivo Alavés have only won one of their 10 home LaLiga games against CA Osasuna, a 2-0 victory in October 2000. They do not have a lower win percentage against any other opponent they have faced at least six times at home in the competition. CA Osasuna are unbeaten in their last 12 LaLiga matches against Deportivo Alavés. They have only enjoyed a better unbeaten run in the top-flight against Elche and Cádiz.

programme.title: Mallorca vs Real Madrid - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
programme.desc: Real Club Deportivo Mallorca have won two of their last five home games against Real Madrid CF in LaLiga, one more victory than in their previous 12 encounters on the island in the competition. Real Madrid CF have won 13 of their last 16 games against Real Club Deportivo Mallorca in LaLiga, scoring in the last five. The Whites have not had a longer scoring run against the Balearic side in the competition since May 2010.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will meet for a fifth time in European competition, with all five coming at the quarter-final stage of the UEFA Champions League. Atlético Madrid have only lost one of their previous four UEFA Champions League games against Barcelona, and have eliminated the Catalan side in both of their previous knockout stage ties. Only Paris SG have eliminated Barcelona more times in the knockout stages of the European Cup/Champions League.

programme.title: Bologna vs Aston Villa - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Salon VIP - Magazine 2025-2026

programme.desc: Sport, Basketball. Plus grande ligue professionnelle de basket-ball au monde, la NBA offre une competition d'elite entre 30 equipes. La saison atteint son apogee lors des Finales NBA, ou les meilleures franchises s'affrontent pour le titre de champion.

programme.title: Doc Rse Au Dela Des Sommets FF Handisport - Documentaire
programme.desc: Sport, Debate, Paralympic games. Suivant les athletes paralympiques francais, cela met en lumiere leur entrainement, leur resilience et leur progression, jusqu' a des performances exceptionnelles sur la scene paralympique.

programme.title: England vs Japan - International Friendly - 2026
programme.desc: England are unbeaten in their three games against Japan, beating them 2-1 in both June 1995 in the Umbro Cup and in a May 2010 friendly, while they shared a 1-1 draw in June 2004. An Asian nation has never previously beaten England in 10 attempts – this is England’s first game against an Asian team since a 6-2 win over IR Iran in November 2022 at the FIFA World Cup.

programme.title: Real Sociedad vs Levante - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
programme.desc: Real Sociedad have won their last two home games against Levante in LaLiga, both by a 1-0 scoreline, the first time they have recorded consecutive home victories against them in the top-flight. Levante have only lost 38% of their away games against Real Sociedad in LaLiga, their lowest percentage of away defeats against a single opponent with at least 10 visits in their entire top-flight history.

programme.title: Mallorca vs Real Madrid - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
programme.desc: Real Club Deportivo Mallorca have won two of their last five home games against Real Madrid CF in LaLiga, one more victory than in their previous 12 encounters on the island in the competition. Real Madrid CF have won 13 of their last 16 games against Real Club Deportivo Mallorca in LaLiga, scoring in the last five. The Whites have not had a longer scoring run against the Balearic side in the competition since May 2010.

programme.title: Real Betis vs Espanyol - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
programme.desc: Real Betis have won their last four LaLiga matches against Espanyol, their second-best winning streak against the Periquitos in the competition's history, after a run of six between 1981 and 1983. Espanyol have not won any of their last six away LaLiga games against Real Betis, losing on their last two visits. The Espanyol side have not lost three consecutive away matches against Real Betis in the competition since September 1987.

programme.title: Atlético de Madrid vs Barcelona - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
programme.desc: Atlético de Madrid have won three of their last seven games at the Riyadh Air Metropolitano against FC Barcelona in all competitions, including a 4-0 victory in February 2026 in the Copa del Rey during the Blaugrana's last visit, which was their biggest home win against them since April 1989. FC Barcelona have won their last three away games against Atlético de Madrid in LaLiga, becoming the only visiting team to achieve three consecutive victories in the competition at the Riyadh Air Metropolitano.

programme.title: Real Sociedad vs Levante - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
programme.desc: Real Sociedad have won their last two home games against Levante in LaLiga, both by a 1-0 scoreline, the first time they have recorded consecutive home victories against them in the top-flight. Levante have only lost 38% of their away games against Real Sociedad in LaLiga, their lowest percentage of away defeats against a single opponent with at least 10 visits in their entire top-flight history.

programme.title: Mallorca vs Real Madrid - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
programme.desc: Real Club Deportivo Mallorca have won two of their last five home games against Real Madrid CF in LaLiga, one more victory than in their previous 12 encounters on the island in the competition. Real Madrid CF have won 13 of their last 16 games against Real Club Deportivo Mallorca in LaLiga, scoring in the last five. The Whites have not had a longer scoring run against the Balearic side in the competition since May 2010.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will meet for a fifth time in European competition, with all five coming at the quarter-final stage of the UEFA Champions League. Atlético Madrid have only lost one of their previous four UEFA Champions League games against Barcelona, and have eliminated the Catalan side in both of their previous knockout stage ties. Only Paris SG have eliminated Barcelona more times in the knockout stages of the European Cup/Champions League.

programme.title: EN MLB Plays of the Week 2026 | E1
Coquimbo Unido (CHI) vs Nacional (URU) - Copa Libertadores 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.

programme.title: Rayo Vallecano vs AEK Athens - UEFA Conference League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: The UEFA Conference League is the third-tier club football tournament organised by UEFA. The new format competition runs for its second season live and exclusive only on beIN. The RB Arena in Leipzig, Germany, is the venue for the Conference League final on 27 May 2026.

programme.title: Porto vs Nottingham Forest - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Porto vs Nottingham Forest - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg

This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Atlético de Madrid vs Barcelona - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
programme.desc: Atlético de Madrid have won three of their last seven games at the Riyadh Air Metropolitano against FC Barcelona in all competitions, including a 4-0 victory in February 2026 in the Copa del Rey during the Blaugrana's last visit, which was their biggest home win against them since April 1989. FC Barcelona have won their last three away games against Atlético de Madrid in LaLiga, becoming the only visiting team to achieve three consecutive victories in the competition at the Riyadh Air Metropolitano.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

programme.desc: Each Ligue 1 Match week is condensed into a 52-minute highlights show. Every game, goal, penalty, red card and everything in between is squeezed into an action-packed hour to ensure no football fan misses a kick across the game season.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

programme.title: beIN Champions - UEFA Champions League 2025/2026
programme.desc: beIN Champions is a look through the best of the action and the unusual stories and stats and facts from the UEFA Champions League.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will meet for a fifth time in European competition, with all five coming at the quarter-final stage of the UEFA Champions League. Atlético Madrid have only lost one of their previous four UEFA Champions League games against Barcelona, and have eliminated the Catalan side in both of their previous knockout stage ties. Only Paris SG have eliminated Barcelona more times in the knockout stages of the European Cup/Champions League.

programme.title: Rayo Vallecano vs AEK Athens - UEFA Conference League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: The UEFA Conference League is the third-tier club football tournament organised by UEFA. The new format competition runs for its second season live and exclusive only on beIN. The RB Arena in Leipzig, Germany, is the venue for the Conference League final on 27 May 2026.

programme.title: Bologna vs Aston Villa - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.desc: Sport, Football. Les temps forts de la Liga sont a l'honneur: matchs cles, moments decisifs, analyses d'experts et decryptages tactiques vous plongent au cœur du football espagnol.

programme.title: Deportivo Alaves vs Osasuna - Liga - J30 - Football 2025-2026
programme.desc: Sport, Football. Vingt clubs, trente-huit journees intenses. La Liga est le grand spectacle du football espagnol ou les legendes naissent, les rivalites s'enflamment et chaque match ecrit un nouveau chapitre dans la quete de gloire.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs. Sunderland - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Newcastle are winless in their last five home league games against Sunderland, with this their first such meeting at St James’ Park since a 1-1 draw in March 2016. Sunderland are unbeaten in their last 10 league games against Newcastle, winning seven of the last eight. It’s the joint-longest run either side has had without defeat in the history of the fixture.

programme.title: Brighton & Hove Albion vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Brighton have won two of their last three home league games against Liverpool, beating them 3-2 in this exact fixture last season. They’d only won one of their first 13 against the Reds. Following their 2-0 win at Anfield in December, Liverpool are looking to complete the league double over Brighton for the first time since 2019-20.

programme.title: A.F.C. Bournemouth vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Bournemouth are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Manchester United, scoring more goals in these five than they did in their first 12 against the Red Devils in the division. Manchester United have lost just two of their eight away Premier League games against Bournemouth. Their last two visits to the Vitality Stadium have seen them come from behind to draw.

programme.desc: 24 Grand Prix from the Formula 1 Season are live and exclusive only on beIN. All Practices, Qualifiers and Races are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary. programme.title: Girona vs Villarreal - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
programme.desc: Girona have not won any of their last four LaLiga matches against Villarreal, their worst winless run against them in the competition. Villarreal have won all five of their away LaLiga matches against Girona and could become the first team in the competition's history to win each of their first six away games against the same opponent in the top-flight.

programme.title: Mallorca vs Real Madrid - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
programme.desc: Real Club Deportivo Mallorca have won two of their last five home games against Real Madrid CF in LaLiga, one more victory than in their previous 12 encounters on the island in the competition. Real Madrid CF have won 13 of their last 16 games against Real Club Deportivo Mallorca in LaLiga, scoring in the last five. The Whites have not had a longer scoring run against the Balearic side in the competition since May 2010.

programme.title: Atlético de Madrid vs Barcelona - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
programme.desc: Atlético de Madrid have won three of their last seven games at the Riyadh Air Metropolitano against FC Barcelona in all competitions, including a 4-0 victory in February 2026 in the Copa del Rey during the Blaugrana's last visit, which was their biggest home win against them since April 1989. FC Barcelona have won their last three away games against Atlético de Madrid in LaLiga, becoming the only visiting team to achieve three consecutive victories in the competition at the Riyadh Air Metropolitano.

programme.title: Real Betis vs Espanyol - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
programme.desc: Real Betis have won their last four LaLiga matches against Espanyol, their second-best winning streak against the Periquitos in the competition's history, after a run of six between 1981 and 1983. Espanyol have not won any of their last six away LaLiga games against Real Betis, losing on their last two visits. The Espanyol side have not lost three consecutive away matches against Real Betis in the competition since September 1987.

programme.title: Rayo Vallecano vs Elche - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
programme.desc: None of the 11 LaLiga meetings between Rayo Vallecano and Elche CF have ended in a draw. Only four fixtures have been played on more occasions without a draw in the competition's history: Arenas-Espanyol, Hércules-Salamanca, Deportivo de La Coruña-Hércules and Pontevedra CF-Valencia. Rayo Vallecano have won their last three home games against Elche CF in all competitions, including the last two at Vallecas in LaLiga, their best run of consecutive home wins against them in their history.

programme.title: La Liga Highlights 2025/2026
programme.desc: "This 55-minute program offers full 5-minute highlights of each of the games played on Friday, Saturday and Sunday.LALIGA includes special video presentations of the best goal, the best save and the best player of the day."

programme.title: Independiente Rivadavia (ARG) vs Bolívar (BOL) - Copa Libertadores 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.

programme.title: Real Sociedad vs Levante - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
programme.desc: Real Sociedad have won their last two home games against Levante in LaLiga, both by a 1-0 scoreline, the first time they have recorded consecutive home victories against them in the top-flight. Levante have only lost 38% of their away games against Real Sociedad in LaLiga, their lowest percentage of away defeats against a single opponent with at least 10 visits in their entire top-flight history.

programme.title: Chelsea vs Port Vale - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Round 6
programme.desc: The Football Association Challenge Cup, more commonly known as the FA Cup, is the oldest national football competition in the world dating back to the 1871-72 season. 736 clubs compete for the chance to lift one of English football's most famous trophies. All the best matches are live and exclusive only on beIN.

programme.title: Lille vs Lens - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
programme.desc: Lille and Lens will face each other for the 122nd time in all competitions, with RCL having only played more against Monaco. Lille have beaten Lens 47 times in all competitions, their joint-most victories against a single opponent, level with Rennes. Lille have won nine of their last ten home games against Lens in Ligue 1, scoring 20 goals and conceding just five in this run, with the only exception being a 1-2 defeat in April 2022.

programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. programme.title: Getafe vs Athletic Club - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
programme.desc: Getafe have won just one of their last 11 LaLiga games against Athletic Club, a 1-0 victory in October 2025. They have only achieved a league double over Athletic Club in the top-flight on two previous occasions: 2004/05 and 2012/13. Athletic Club are unbeaten in their last six away games against Getafe CF in LaLiga, their best away unbeaten run against the 'Azulones' in the competition's history.

programme.title: Valencia vs Celta de Vigo - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
programme.desc: Valencia CF are unbeaten in their last nine home games against Celta de Vigo in LaLiga, their best unbeaten run at home against the Galician side in the competition since February 2002. RC Celta de Vigo have won two of their last three LaLiga matches against Valencia, as many wins as they had in their previous 15 meetings in the competition.

programme.title: Deportivo Vs Malaga - LaLiga Hypermotion 2025-2026 - Spanish La liga 2
programme.desc: La Liga 2 is the men's second professional association football division of the Spanish football league system. It is contested by 22 teams, with the top two teams plus the winner of a play-off promoted to La Liga and replaced by the three lowest-placed teams in that division.

programme.title: M1 Final - ATP 250 - Tiriac Open, Bucharest Romania - 2026
programme.desc: An ATP 250 clay-court tournament held in Bucharest, Romania, played on outdoor red clay. Part of the European clay swing leading into Roland Garros, it features a 28-player singles draw and 16-team doubles. The event rewards strong baseline play, endurance, and tactical construction, with valuable ATP ranking points and a title at stake.

programme.title: Al Shamal vs Umm Salal - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W20
programme.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

programme.title: Andorra Vs Racing - LaLiga Hypermotion 2025-2026 - Spanish La liga 2
programme.desc: La Liga 2 is the men's second professional association football division of the Spanish football league system. It is contested by 22 teams, with the top two teams plus the winner of a play-off promoted to La Liga and replaced by the three lowest-placed teams in that division.

programme.title: One Friday Fights -149
programme.desc: ONE Friday Fights 149 brings another thrilling night of Muay Thai, MMA, and kickboxing to Bangkok’s iconic Lumpinee Stadium on April 3. In the main event, Tomyamkoong looks to build on his dramatic bonus-winning victory against Bejenuta Maximus, who arrives after impressing in Europe. In the co-main event, Isannuea puts his perfect knockout record on the line against the unbeaten Khunpon, plus more explosive matchups.

programme.title: Al Duhail vs Al Gharafa - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W20
programme.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.
